languages.text: "Раз вы сами не способны — ее прикончу я".
"Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."
languages.original_text: "Раз вы сами не способны — ее прикончу я".

traits.locale_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves — I shall be the one to finish it."
"Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves — I shall be the one to finish it."
"Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."
"Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."
"Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

languages.text: "Nachdem Ihr selbst nicht dazu in der Lage seid, werde ich sie erledigen."
languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

traits.locale_text: "Nachdem Ihr selbst nicht dazu in der Lage seid, werde ich sie erledigen."

languages.text: « Puisque vous êtes incapables de le faire vous-mêmes, je vais m'occuper de son cas. »
languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

traits.locale_text: « Puisque vous êtes incapables de le faire vous-mêmes, je vais m'occuper de son cas. »

languages.text: «Ya que no pueden hacerlo ustedes, me ocuparé de la criatura».
languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

traits.locale_text: «Ya que no pueden hacerlo ustedes, me ocuparé de la criatura».

languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

languages.text: “既然你们自己办不到，那就由我来了结它。”
languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

traits.locale_text: “既然你们自己办不到，那就由我来了结它。”

languages.text: 「君たちはそれを自分でできないから、私がそれを終わらせる」
languages.original_text: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."

traits.locale_text: 「君たちはそれを自分でできないから、私がそれを終わらせる」
